commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: 2. "He who walketh without stain, and worketh righteousness" (ver. 2). Here he has laid down the proposition; in what follows he sets it forth in detail.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Justice. These two things characterize the true Israelite. (Calmet)
We must avoid sin, and do good, in thought, word and deed, ver. 3. (Worthington)
